queries.question: What course title and description are common to all online learning platforms?
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.title, Courses.description  from Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses join Courses on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID = Courses.courseID join Online_Learning_Platforms on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID = Online_Learning_Platforms.platformID   GROUP BY Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Online_Learning_Platforms)

queries.question: Give me the descriptions for courses which are common to all learning platforms
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.description  from Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses join Courses on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID = Courses.courseID join Online_Learning_Platforms on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID = Online_Learning_Platforms.platformID   GROUP BY Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Online_Learning_Platforms)

queries.question: What course titles do we have for every online learning platform
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.title  from Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses join Courses on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID = Courses.courseID join Online_Learning_Platforms on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID = Online_Learning_Platforms.platformID   GROUP BY Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Online_Learning_Platforms)

queries.question: What course titles do we have for every online learning platform
queries.sql: select online_learning_platforms.name , courses.title from Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses join Courses on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID = Courses.courseID join Online_Learning_Platforms on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID = Online_Learning_Platforms.platformID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?online_learning_platforms_courses a :Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?online_learning_platforms_courses p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?online_learning_platforms a :Online_Learning_Platforms .
  ?online_learning_platforms_courses p:hasOnline_Learning_Platforms ?online_learning_platforms .
  ?online_learning_platforms p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:title ?title .
}

queries.question: For each learning platform, give me the description of the courses it offers
queries.sql: select online_learning_platforms.name , courses.description from Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses join Courses on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID = Courses.courseID join Online_Learning_Platforms on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID = Online_Learning_Platforms.platformID

queries.question: For each online learning platform, what is the corresponding course title and description?
queries.sql: select online_learning_platforms.name , courses.title , courses.description from Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses join Courses on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.courseID = Courses.courseID join Online_Learning_Platforms on Online_Learning_Platforms_Courses.platformID = Online_Learning_Platforms.platformID
